task: Semantic codebase indexing: AST-aware (tree-sitter) per-file indexing into a separate Pinecone index, queried by the agent via a new tool with semantic/exact_call mode switch. Indexing runs sequentially before each PR review.

files.note: NEW - tree-sitter parsing, embedding, Pinecone upsert. Pseudocode written, awaiting implementation + tests.
NEW - agent tool with semantic/exact_call mode
MODIFIED - call indexing service before agent
MODIFIED - register new tool, retire old search_codebase

flow_diagram: webhook → handle_pull_request_event → enqueue_review → run_review_job → handle_pr_review → [index_changed_files (NEW, sequential) → abort on service failure, skip+log on per-file parse failure] → _run_code_review_agent (new tool: search_codebase with semantic/exact_call mode)
